hypothesis: If trained on the ChEMBL3D dataset and equipped with stereochemical graph augmentations, then the LoQI diffusion model will generate stereochemically correct, topology-preserving molecular conformer ensembles whose energies and geometries closely match near-DFT-optimized references (yielding low relative energies and RMSDs) and outperform existing conformer generators on large, flexible drug-like molecules and macrocycles.
